title: Kindness Comes Back Around
lesson: A small act of kindness returns to you when you least expect it.
prompts: On a tree-lined suburban pavement in the morning sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image walks along the pavement. Medium shot at eye level, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a tree-lined suburban pavement in the morning sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stops mid-step in the mid-ground, one hand raised in surprise, with a concerned expression. In the foreground, {GENDER_F_AGE_70_RACE_ASIAN} has dropped a torn paper grocery bag and bends to reach after the oranges rolling across the ground. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a tree-lined suburban pavement in the morning sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is kneeling, gathering oranges back into the torn bag. {GENDER_F_AGE_70_RACE_ASIAN} stands nearby with both hands clasped, watching gratefully. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a tree-lined suburban pavement in the morning sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image walks carrying two grocery bags, with a kind smile. {GENDER_F_AGE_70_RACE_ASIAN} walks beside them, gesturing toward a small house with a blue door. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

At a roadside bus stop with wet reflective pavement, rain falling, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands alone with no umbrella, wrapping both arms tightly around themselves and hunching against the cold. Medium shot at eye level, overcast grey light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

At a roadside bus stop with wet reflective pavement, rain falling, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands, one hand pressed to their chest as they glance up at the umbrella, with a surprised, grateful expression. Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_25_RACE_ASIAN} holds a large umbrella over both of them and smiles warmly. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm light breaking through the clouds, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
gists: On a tree-lined suburban pavement in morning sun, the child walks along happily — an ordinary cheerful morning, the child alone.
On the suburban pavement, the child stops in surprise with one hand raised as an elderly woman drops a torn grocery bag and oranges roll across the ground — the child has just noticed her trouble.
On the pavement, the child kneels gathering the spilled oranges back into the torn bag while the elderly woman stands, hands clasped, watching gratefully.
On the pavement, the child walks carrying two grocery bags with a kind smile while the elderly woman walks beside them, gesturing toward her house with a blue door.
At a rainy roadside bus stop under grey overcast light, the child stands alone with no umbrella, arms wrapped around themselves, cold and wet.
At the bus stop, the child looks up gratefully with a hand to their chest as a young man holds a large umbrella over them both — kindness returning as the light warms.
texts: One sunny morning, {NAME} set off down the street. The birds were singing, and the sky was bright and blue. "What a lovely day!" said {NAME}, skipping along.

Up ahead, an old lady's bag tore open and her oranges rolled everywhere. "Oh no — your oranges!" cried {NAME}, hurrying over. "They're rolling away!" said the old lady. "Don't worry, I'll help!" said {NAME}.
{NAME} knelt down and picked up every single orange, one by one. "Here you are," said {NAME}, popping the last one in. "Thank you, dear, you're so kind," said the old lady.
"Let me carry these for you," said {NAME}, lifting the heavy bags. "Why, thank you! My house is just there, with the blue door," said the old lady, smiling all the way home.
A few days later, rain poured down at the bus stop. {NAME} had no umbrella and hugged both arms tight. "Brrr, I'm so cold and wet," {NAME} shivered.
Then a kind young man held his big umbrella over them both. "Here, stay dry!" he said warmly. "Thank you so much!" said {NAME} with a happy smile. {NAME}'s kindness had come back around.
